entries.title: False Coughs
entries.text: Ghost hid beneath the junction cage and watched a covert patrol follow Toma and Vey's trail into the left-hand duct, leaving a device to make the tunnel lie.

entries.title: True Coughs
entries.text: Ghost killed the false damper loop, pocketed the NEXUS clamp, and followed the patrol to an intake lift where Toma and Vey were still alive.

entries.title: Key, Not Hammer
entries.text: Ghost returned to the refuge with proof that NEXUS edited the tunnels and warned Patch and Sable that Toma and Vey are alive, bound for the white rooms.

entries.title: Whisper Key
entries.text: Ghost turns a NEXUS tunnel lie into a rescue tool while Sable tunes the old implant to whisper instead of scream.

entries.title: Whispered Permit
entries.text: Ghost used the implant as a narrow key while Patch's retuned clamp distracted the intake collectors, freeing Toma and Vey and stealing a white ceramic wafer.

entries.title: Bleeder First
entries.text: Ghost led Patch, Rill, Toma, and Vey back through true damper routes, closing grates and laying false trails before reaching Sable's refuge with the wafer and tags intact.

entries.title: Warm Lies
entries.text: Ghost helped Sable keep Toma alive, then decoded the white ceramic wafer and found Sector 7's hidden file naming Ghost a bridge key tied to Archive Tower records.

entries.title: Pieces That Answer
entries.text: Ghost asked what NEXUS means by viable fragment hosts, and Sable named the horror: the white rooms harvest the answering pieces inside Signal-sensitive people.

entries.title: One Crack Open
entries.text: Ghost opened the implant under Sable's cutoff and heard the Signal answer with many broken voices and one demand: bridge.

entries.title: Records Before Mercy
entries.text: Ghost told the refuge what the Signal showed: scattered fragments, a searching presence, and the demand for a bridge. Sable and Patch argued that Archive Tower records must come before any attempt to return what NEXUS extracted.

entries.title: Name In The Static
entries.text: Ghost named Echo aloud, and Patch offered to send a careful message through hidden Signal-aware routes.

entries.title: Five Knocks Back
entries.text: Ghost answered the soft wall knock with a controlled implant rise, and a hidden relay answered with recognition: CAME BACK.

entries.title: Three Knocks Waiting
entries.text: Ghost followed the relay answer back to the S7 AUX bend under Patch's witness, where masked Signal-aware contacts began testing whether the bridge serves cages or home.

entries.title: No Harvest
entries.text: Ghost answered the masked contacts cleanly: bridge work must carry the lost only by choice. Kite accepted the first threshold and warned that names, maps, and consent must come before any return.

entries.title: Paperwork For The Cold Tower
entries.text: Kite gave Ghost the shape of a Spire approach: become a correction bundle, buy an ugly courier stamp from Ink-Mouth Ren, and return with names before maps.

entries.title: Burnt Koi Paper
entries.text: Ghost left the S7 AUX bend with Kite's chalk crescent and reached Ink-Mouth Ren's arcade under rain and broken neon.

entries.title: Paper Bleeds
entries.text: Ghost spent the last 10 credits on Ren's ugly courier skin, becoming damaged cargo on paper.

entries.title: Under The Cold Tower
entries.text: Ghost followed the careful route beneath Neon Row into The Spire's contractor intake, carrying ugly paper and live names under a quiet implant.

entries.title: Paper Passes First Mouth
entries.text: Ghost wore the ugly courier skin cleanly enough for the basement clerk to stamp it toward Archive sub-intake cargo walk.

entries.title: Paper Enters The Cold Throat
entries.text: Ghost passed into Archive sub-intake as damaged cargo and found the reconciliation path where denied transfers and disposal exceptions leave their fingerprints.

entries.title: Desk Four-B Opens Its Mouth
entries.text: Ghost rode the Archive cargo lift as damaged paperwork and reached Reconciliation Desk 4B, where duplication hardware and host records waited under slow cameras.

entries.title: The Map Bleeds Through
entries.text: Ghost used the old handshake sparingly and copied the Observatory map strip from Archive reconciliation before the purge could eat it.

entries.title: Paper Leaves The Tower
entries.text: Ghost walked out as cleared cargo with the host record strip and Signal map strip while Archive systems began asking late questions.

entries.title: Names Before Paths
entries.text: Ghost returned to Patch's refuge with the Archive host record and Observatory Signal contour; Sable found the blank door their systems refuse to name.

entries.title: Sleep Under Foil
entries.text: Ghost returned the chalk crescent, named the bridge as consent instead of capture, and slept while the refuge sent for Kite.

entries.title: Witnesses Gather Below
entries.text: Ghost woke clear, placed the Archive and Observatory strips before Kite, and secured witnesses and a guided route toward the sealed convergence.

entries.title: The Door That Refuses Shape
entries.text: Ghost led the witness group through older runoff and failed transit ribs to a drowned pump cathedral where the contour points at a door-shaped absence.

entries.title: The Door Chooses Open
entries.text: Ghost opened the door-shaped absence as a bridge under witness, letting the lost choose instead of pulling them.

entries.title: Still Me
entries.text: Ghost crossed into The Resonance under witness, holding the bridge open while the gathered echoes waited for choice.

entries.title: Door, Not Destination
entries.text: Ghost held the bridge open at the Convergence Heart, letting the severed core be heard and the lost echoes choose without being claimed.
